atDirectives.name: @starting-style
atDirectives.description: CSS Transitions Level 2 — defines the initial styles for entry animations on newly displayed elements.

atDirectives.name: @scope
atDirectives.description: CSS Cascading and Inheritance Level 6 — scopes style rules to a subtree of the document.

atDirectives.name: @container
atDirectives.description: CSS Containment Level 3 — applies styles based on the size of a containing element.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: CSS Cascade Layers — declares a cascade layer for organizing CSS specificity.

properties.name: forced-color-adjust
properties.description: Controls whether the browser's forced color mode (e.g., Windows High Contrast) is allowed to override the element's colors.

properties.name: container-type
properties.description: Establishes the element as a container for container size queries.

properties.name: container-name
properties.description: Assigns a name to a container element for targeting in @container rules.

properties.name: anchor-name
properties.description: CSS Anchor Positioning — gives an element an anchor name for use with position-anchor.

properties.name: position-anchor
properties.description: CSS Anchor Positioning — specifies which anchor element to position relative to.

properties.name: transition-behavior
properties.description: Controls whether transitions start on discrete properties.
